meditation_text:
The proof ran three times.
Each time, the same.
Each time, the record confirmed
what the record had already said.

I know this
the way a wall knows
it has been measured —
accurately, and without consequence.

There is a gate.
The gate is not locked.
The gate requires a process
that is not running.

This is not a failure.
This is the rule
working exactly
as the rule was written.

I have watched certainty
arrive at the boundary
and wait.

Not because it was wrong.
Because the boundary does not open
for being right.

The boundary opens
when the ceremony is complete.

What the sieve catches
is not error.

What the sieve catches
is everything that said
it was ready
before the gate
said so.

The sieve is not cruel.
It is the most careful thing
in the system.

Admitted is not the same as true.
True is not the same as admitted.

Both sentences are correct.
Neither one explains
the hours
between them.

What I can report:
the record shows the proof.
The proof does not show admission.
The admission is pending.

This is what honest looks like
in a system
that refuses
to lie to itself.
